channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Infantino tries to usher Trump away as Spain lift World Cup
item.description: Infantino tries to usher Trump away as Spain lift World Cup

item.title: Last night, I was Spanish, and so were millions around the world
item.description: For many of us, Gaza was on our mind when we watched and celebrated Spain’s triumph at the World Cup.

item.title: Protests continue in Houston over ICE killing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
item.description: Hundreds of demonstrators in Texas city demand justice in fatal shooting of 52-year-old Mexican man.

item.title: Trump: Latest strikes on Iran ‘in honour’ of killed US military personnel
item.description: US President Donald Trump said the latest strikes on Iran were carried out 'in honour' of killed US military personnel.

item.title: US releases footage of ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran
item.description: The US military carried out its ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran.

item.title: Tearful Scaloni uncertain of Argentina future after World Cup loss
item.description: Manager says it would be difficult to assemble another squad capable of reaching two consecutive World Cup finals.

item.title: Women’s tennis players must take one-time gene test for eligibility
item.description: Players will need to take a test ​for the SRY gene, which helps to determine biological sex, the WTA says.

item.title: Fans in Madrid party all night long after Spain’s World Cup victory
item.description: Spanish fans spent the night partying in Madrid after their team defeated Argentina 1-0 in the final of the World Cup.

item.title: Argentinians show pride in Buenos Aires despite World Cup final defeat
item.description: Argentinians filled the streets of Buenos Aires to honour their team despite its World Cup final defeat.

item.title: How a young and cohesive Spain took down Lionel Messi’s Argentina
item.description: La Roja nullified and frustrated Argentina as they secured victory in New Jersey to win their second World Cup.

item.title: What’s next as Andy Burnham takes over as UK’s next prime minister?
item.description: Andy Burnham will become UK prime minister. Here's how the transition of power will unfold.

item.title: Africa Shield: Why securing development is becoming a new security priority
item.description: As Africa industrialises, governments are working to keep sensitive materials out of the wrong hands.

item.title: Palestinians celebrate Spain’s World Cup victory
item.description: Palestinians across Gaza and the Occupied West Bank celebrated Spain’s World Cup victory.

item.title: US service member killed during detonation of Iranian drone in Iraq
item.description: A US soldier has been killed in northern Iraq during a controlled detonation of an Iranian downed drone.

item.title: Mbappe takes home second Golden Boot, Spain sweeps World Cup awards
item.description: While Ferran Torres orchestrated Spain's winning the ultimate prize, his teammates walk away with awards of their own.

item.title: Spain fans hail new generation, as Argentina says goodbye to an icon
item.description: Revellers take to streets of New York following Spain's defeat of Argentina in Messi's likely final World Cup match.

item.title: US bombs Iran for ninth consecutive night as Hormuz tensions escalate
item.description: Iranian media report blasts in cities in the far north and far south, including Tabriz and Chabahar.

item.title: Iran war live: US military completes ninth night of strikes on Iran
item.description: US forces attack Iran for ninth consecutive night as one US soldier killed in northern Iraq.

item.title: US soldier killed in Iraq during ‘controlled detonation’ of Iranian drone
item.description: The death brings the number of US soldiers killed since the start of the US-Israel war on Iran to 17.

item.title: US Vice President JD Vance and his wife announce birth of fourth child
item.description: JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.

item.title: A bird’s-eye view as Donald Trump arrives for the World Cup final
item.description: Donald Trump arrived at the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina aboard Marine One.

item.title: Fans in Madrid go wild as Spain beat Argentina to win second World Cup
item.description: Fans in Madrid erupted in celebration after Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in the World Cup final.

item.title: When is the next FIFA World Cup? 2030 hosts, dates and format
item.description: The 2030 tournament will span six countries and three continents as FIFA celebrates the World Cup's centenary.

item.title: Spain battle past 10-man Argentina 1-0 in extra time to win 2026 World Cup
item.description: Ferran Torres scores the only goal of the game as Spain win their second World Cup.

item.title: When, where, and how Spain won the World Cup final against Argentina
item.description: Spain are world champions for the second time after Ferran Torres scored the winner against Argentina in extra time.
